title: Digital Menu System  (InfoSpec Systems)
description: A full-stack, tablet-optimized digital menu application allowing restaurant patrons to browse items and place orders directly from their tables. Built robust API endpoints and responsive UI features using ASP.NET, C#, JavaScript, and Microsoft SQL Server.

title: Kitchen Display System  (InfoSpec Systems)
description: A comprehensive React-based Kitchen Display System (KDS) developed for InfoSpec Systems. Features include high-speed real-time order processing, granular summary views, floor plans, and live sold-out tracking integrated with ASP.NET core systems.

title: Swype Waitlist (InfoSpec Systems)
description: A production Android waitlist application deployed on the Google Play Store. Modernized the legacy codebase to a robust MVVM architecture utilizing ViewModel and LiveData for reactive UI updates.

title: Drowsiness Detection Robot
description: DreamHack 2025 (1st Place out of 30 teams). An autonomous robot that detects user drowsiness using real-time facial recognition and eye-tracking algorithms via OpenCV. Integrated hardware controls to trigger a water spray mechanism upon detecting sleep patterns.

title: Social Media Clone
description: A full-stack web application with Express.js serving a REST API and React as the frontend. Features secure user authentication, post creation, likes, comments, and real-time activity updates.

title: Plateful
description: A food product search and recipe recommendation web app. Integrated a third-party API for dynamic suggestions, configured CI/CD pipelines, and led a 3-person Agile development team.
